rules.rule: every extraction candidate MUST cite candidate_id, source_evidence_id, extraction_runtime_id, extraction_rule_id, reviewer, confidence_state ∈ CONFIDENCE_STATES, reasoning_chain, and lineage pointers.
candidate_kind MUST be in CANDIDATE_KINDS; unknown kinds are fail-closed.
candidates default to confidence_state='unresolved' unless the reviewer explicitly attributes a higher state.
autonomous approval is FORBIDDEN; only reviewer-attributed lifecycle transitions may set 'reviewer-approved'.
duplicate candidate_id is FORBIDDEN; a new candidate citing prior_candidate_id MUST be recorded as supersedence.
candidates citing OCR fragments MUST cite at least one ocr_fragment_id; orphan OCR references BLOCK approval.
candidates citing video frames MUST cite frame_index and timestamp_ms; missing frames BLOCK approval.
candidate manifests are append-only; in-place mutation is FORBIDDEN.
